project_type: C++20 desktop security platform with modular architecture
build_system: CMake 3.22 with -DENABLE_QT=OFF for headless build. Each module is a static library (add_library STATIC) with PUBLIC include dir and PRIVATE src dir.
test_framework: doctest (header-only at third_party/doctest/include/doctest/doctest.h). Tests are all compiled into a single executable (threatone_tests) from tests/CMakeLists.txt. test_main.cpp defines DOCTEST_CONFIG_IMPLEMENT_WITH_MAIN.
verification_instructions: 1. Run cmake -B build -DENABLE_QT=OFF to configure. 2. Run cmake --build build to compile. 3. Run cd build && ctest --output-on-failure to run tests.
setup_instructions: Pre-installed: CMake 3.22, GCC 11.5, Clang 15. Third-party deps are vendored in third_party/ (spdlog, nlohmann/json, doctest, sqlite3 stub). No external package install needed.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - no external downloads. All dependencies must be vendored or self-contained. No Docker daemon available. Use host-based compilation only.
contribution_requirements: C++20 standard, match existing patterns (Result<T> types, ModuleLogger, EventBus pub/sub, ServiceLocator DI). Static libraries with public include directories.
key_patterns: 1. Each module: src/<module>/include/<module>/Header.h + src/<module>/src/Impl.cpp + src/<module>/CMakeLists.txt. 2. Interfaces start with I prefix (IEDREngine, IMonitorEngine). 3. Logger: ModuleLogger from Core::Logger::instance().getModuleLogger(name). 4. Error handling: Result<T, Error> with .isOk()/.isErr()/.value(). 5. Events: derive from Core::Event, publish via EventBus::instance().publish(). 6. Tests: TEST_CASE with SUBCASE, use temp directories, test with CHECK/REQUIRE macros. 7. Namespaces: ThreatOne::EDR, ThreatOne::Monitor. 8. nlohmann_json available for JSON parsing. 9. Threads via find_package(Threads REQUIRED).
directory_structure: Root: CMakeLists.txt, cmake/, src/, tests/, third_party/, build/. src/ has 25+ module dirs each with include/ and src/. tests/ has test_main.cpp + subdirs per module. third_party/ has doctest, spdlog, nlohmann/json, sqlite3 stub.
